name: vizmatic
description: Create and render theme-aware diagrams, charts, docs figures, and animated GIFs from TSX.

interface.shortDescription: Create diagrams and charts from TSX
interface.longDescription: Use Vizmatic scene primitives to render diagrams, dashboards, docs figures, presentation frames, and animated GIFs.
defaultPrompt: Use @vizmatic to create an architecture diagram and render dark and light PNG files.
Use $vizmatic to turn this workflow into a docs figure.
